incident_report:
# Incident Report: Seed 6 Dungeon Run

**Summary:**
This dungeon expedition failed due to repeated spurious_block anomalies that prevented meaningful progress. Over 51 turns, Agent A and Agent B encountered 10 blocking anomalies—approximately one every 5 turns—without recovering a key pickup or unlocking any doors. The run terminated at the turn limit with a progress score of 0.0, indicating the agents never advanced beyond the starting area.

**Root Cause:**
The agents were trapped in a pattern of movement failures caused by spurious_block anomalies (turns 3, 13, 15, 23, 25, 31, 32, 37, 45, 48). These anomalies appeared to prevent navigation regardless of agent or attempted direction, suggesting either an environmental obstruction issue or a failure in the anomaly detection/recovery system itself. The absence of any DM interactions or messages sent indicates the agents never communicated a problem or adapted their strategy.

**Critical Decision Point:**
The most notable failure was between turns 23–25, when Agent A hit its fourth anomaly (turn 23) immediately followed by Agent B encountering a block (turn 25). At this juncture, the agents should have either (1) attempted communication to coordinate around the obstruction, or (2) signaled for DM intervention
